timeline.title: Arrival & Setup
items: easyJet flight EZY8553 Gatwick ➔ Bodrum
Arrive BJV at 20:05
Check-in Airbnb

timeline.title: Beach Vibe Day
items: Spend day exploring Yalıkavak Palmarina
Walk Bodrum Town Marina

timeline.title: WATERFRONT DINING
items: Bohemian vibes in Gümüşlük
Waterfront sunset cold mezes

timeline.title: Aegean Coasting
items: Leisurely walk near the Bodrum castle
Final dinner with Maca

timeline.title: Arrival & Nişantaşı
items: Turkish Airlines TK2511 BJV ➔ IST (Land 15:55)
Transit to Harbiye Residence (Check-in 17:00)
Healin Foods Nişantaşı clean-eating dinner (19:00)

timeline.title: Modern Bosphorus: Etiler, Arnavutköy & Bebek
items: 12:15 PM – 12:50 PM | Transit: Nişantaşı to Etiler (Metro M2 to Levent, transfer M6 to Etiler)
12:50 PM – 2:30 PM | Lunch in Etiler (Amaya, Nusr-Et, or Minoa Village)
2:30 PM – 2:45 PM | Transit: Etiler down to Arnavutköy (Uber/Taxi)
2:45 PM – 4:15 PM | Coastal Exploration: Arnavutköy (Ottoman-era wooden mansions & espresso)
4:15 PM – 4:35 PM | Transit: Arnavutköy to Bebek (Walking Bebek Sahili promenade)
4:35 PM – 6:30 PM | Golden Hour & People Watching: Bebek (Baylan or Bebek Kahvesi, Bebek Park)
6:30 PM – 7:00 PM | Transit: Bebek to Yeniköy (Uber/Taxi)
7:00 PM – 9:30 PM | Waterfront Dinner in Yeniköy (Azur, Gazebo, or Manca Yeniköy)
9:30 PM onwards | Transit: Yeniköy back to Nişantaşı (Uber/Taxi)

timeline.title: Old City Tour & Palace Dining
items: Hagia Sophia (10:30 AM - sleep in and explore at a relaxed pace)

Basilica Cistern (12:30 PM timed entry tour) - Meeting Point: Sultanahmet Meydanı, Cankurtaran, 34149 Fatih/İstanbul. Meet at Busforus Bus Stop across the Hagia Sophia (Bus stop sign). Look for the guide holding a white Istanbul E-pass flag (be there by 12:20 PM).
Grand Bazaar & Spice Bazaar walkthrough & local lunch (13:00)
Süleymaniye Mosque for stunning Golden Horn views (15:30)
Return to Nişantaşı hotel to shower, change and relax (16:45)
Waterfront dinner at Tuğra Restaurant in Çırağan Palace Kempinski (19:30) (famous historic palace next to Four Seasons)
Walk next door for drinks at the Four Seasons Bosphorus YALI Lounge terrace (21:30)

lunchOptions.name: Tuğra Restaurant (Çırağan)
lunchOptions.query: Tugra Restaurant Ciragan Palace Kempinski Istanbul

lunchOptions.name: YALI Lounge (Four Seasons)
lunchOptions.query: Yali Lounge Four Seasons Hotel Istanbul at the Bosphorus

timeline.title: Bosphorus, Karaköy & Zeyrek Hamam
items: Specialty coffee crawl in Nişantaşı (e.g. Petra) (09:00 AM)
Dolmabahçe Palace tour (11:00 AM)
Waterfront stroll at Karaköy & Galataport (12:30 PM)
Karaköy Lokantası late meze lunch / early dinner (14:15) (Backup: Feriye Lokantası or Muuto)
Flagship dessert tasting at Karaköy Güllüoğlu (15:45)
Zeyrek Çinili Hamam luxury bath & scrub (16:30 - 18:30)
Grab healthy takeaway in Nişantaşı to eat at the hotel (19:15)
Meeting (06:00 PM London / 08:00 PM local time)
Optional drinks at Efendi Nişantaşı or Arkestra Listening Room (21:30)

timeline.title: Departure Day
items: Check out of Harbiye Residence (09:30 AM)
Transit to Istanbul Airport (IST)
Turkish Airlines TK1039 to Bucharest (13:20 departure)

timeline.title: Romania Transit & Historic Vibe
items: Turkish Airlines TK1039 IST ➔ OTP (Arrive Bucharest 14:35)
Uber / Bolt to Calea Victoriei Airbnb (Check-in 15:30)
Stroll Calea Victoriei past CEC Palace & tour the historic Stavropoleos Monastery
Wander lively Old Town (Lipscani) & have dinner at the iconic Caru' cu Bere
Must-do: Order papanași for dessert and do a traditional pălincă tasting
Late drinks at Fix Me a Drink botanical cocktail bar or Linea Closer to the Moon rooftop

timeline.title: Bucharest Sights: Palace of Parliament & Old Icons
items: Tour the golden-leaf neoclassical hall of the Romanian Athenaeum (11:00 AM)
Browse spiral balconies at Cărturești Carusel bookshop in the Old Town (12:00 PM)
Palace of the Parliament guided tour (03:00 PM - book in advance)
Walk to the peaceful Darvari Skete hidden church courtyard & shop (04:45 PM)
Pop into Casa Mița Biciclista or Casa Capșa for pastries in a historic building (05:30 PM)
Fine dining dinner at The Artist modern molecular cuisine on Calea Victoriei (19:30)

timeline.title: Local Living & Engagement Party
items: Specialty filter coffee & breakfast at Frudisiac or Bob Coffee Lab (09:00 AM)
Tour Ceaușescu Mansion (Palatul Primăverii) in Bucharest's most exclusive district (10:30 AM)
Stroll the leafy luxury residential streets of Primăverii & Floreasca
Walk the Herăstrău Lakefront paths followed by upscale lakeside lunch (12:30 PM)
Relax and prepare for the evening event (03:00 PM)
Engagement Party - Max & Fin (07:30 PM)

timeline.title: Transylvanian Arrival & Royal Stopover
items: Checkout from Airbnb & Uber/Bolt to Bucharest Gara de Nord (09:30 AM)
InterRegio train from Bucharest to Sinaia (10:15 AM - 11:45 AM)
Store bags at Sinaia station left-luggage desk (or Hotel Caraiman next door)
Walk up to the Royal Estate & lunch next to the castle at Carol Gastro Bierhaus (12:30 PM)
Tour the stunning neo-Renaissance Peleș Castle (02:30 PM timed entry)
InterRegio train from Sinaia to Braşov (05:15 PM - 06:15 PM)
Uber/taxi to Braşov Airbnb on Strada Lungă 39 & check-in
Dinner at Dei Frati for exceptional handmade pasta (19:30)

timeline.title: Braşov Sights & Bran Castle
items: Day trip to the dramatic gothic towers of cliffside Bran Castle (12:00 PM)
Walk down Rope Street (Strada Sforii) - one of Europe's narrowest paths (03:00 PM)
Climb the medieval Black Tower & White Tower for orange-roofed skyline views (04:00 PM)
Explore historic defensive walls and Weavers' Bastion (05:00 PM)
Slow-food Transylvanian dinner inside a 16th-century hall at Bistro de l'Arte (19:30)

timeline.title: Day Trip to Sighișoara UNESCO Citadel
items: Depart Braşov for Sighișoara medieval walled town (09:00 AM)
Tour Sighișoara Citadel, Clock Tower, and covered stairs (11:00 AM)
Explore the birthplace of Vlad the Impaler (Dracula)
Return to Braşov in the late afternoon (04:30 PM)
Dinner at forest-edge Sub Tâmpa at the foot of the mountain (19:30)

timeline.title: Depart Romania via Gara de Nord
items: Check out of Braşov Airbnb (09:00 AM)
InterRegio train from Braşov to Bucharest Gara de Nord (09:30 AM departure)
Direct airport train from Gara de Nord to Otopeni (OTP) (12:30 PM)
Arrive at OTP Airport with safe buffer (12:50 PM)
British Airways BA875 back to London Heathrow LHR (16:15 departure)

timeline.title: Saronic Crossing
items: BA626 London ➔ Athens (Arr: 13:10)
Transit to Piraeus, sail on afternoon ferry
Arrive Spetses Island, check-in Teresa suite

timeline.title: Zogeria Turquoise Waters
items: Cycle or water taxi to Zogeria beach cove
Seafood meze lunch on the sand

timeline.title: Sunset Veranda Cocktails
items: Relaxed beach morning at Agia Paraskevi
Evening drinks at Poseidonion Hotel veranda

timeline.title: Old Harbour Dining
items: Leisurely island bike ride
Dinner under harbor lanterns at Orloff

timeline.title: Quiet Cove Sunsets
items: Swim and final sunbathing hours

timeline.title: Spetses ➔ Athens ➔ London
items: Sail from Spetses by 14:00
British Airways BA631 ATH ➔ LHR (19:30)

timeline.title: LHR ➔ HND Flight
items: BA007 London Heathrow departure (09:25)
Overnight international flight in the air

timeline.title: Welcome to Shinsen
items: Land Haneda 07:00 AM
Check-in Shibuya Airbnb (Host Noe)
Pour-over coffee walk in Shinsen village

timeline.title: Shinsen Explorations
items: Specialty coffee at Camelback
Explore Daikanyama T-Site architectural bookstore

timeline.title: Shibuya Gym Training
items: Bodybuilding workout at Gold's Gym Shibuya
Cover tattoos and bring clean indoor shoes

timeline.title: Underground Food Halls
items: Pick bento treats at Tokyu Food Show
Stroll Nakameguro Meguro River canal

timeline.title: Digital Arts & Monjayaki
items: Visit teamLab Planets exhibition
Cook monjayaki pancakes in Tsukishima griddles

timeline.title: Tuna Auction & Old Town
items: Early Toyosu fish market tuna auction
Stroll Yanaka Ginza old merchants street

timeline.title: Micro-Alley Drinks
items: Bar hopping in Nonbei Yokocho
Late jazz records at Lion Cafe

timeline.title: Move to Ben's
items: Check out from Shibuya Airbnb
Move to friend Ben's residence for 9 nights

timeline.title: Staying with Ben
items: No Airbnb bookings
Explore Tokyo local neighborhoods with Ben

timeline.title: Move back to Airbnb
items: Check-in Shibuya Airbnb (Block II)
Get settled for final 4 days in Tokyo

timeline.title: Final Shibuya Days
items: Final gym sessions, omakase sushi dinners

timeline.title: Tokyo ➔ London
items: Check out Shibuya Airbnb by 11:00 AM
BA006 Haneda ➔ LHR T5 (13:05 - 19:50)
